title: alisma plantago-aquatica var. lanceolatum
intro: Alisma plantago-aquatica var. lanceolatum, also known as Chinese water plantain or long-stalked water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Alismataceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Alisma plantago-aquatica var. lanceolatum include reducing edema, alleviating symptoms of kidney stones and nephritis, and helping to lower blood pressure. Alisma plantago-aquatica var. lanceolatum can be prepared in herbal teas, capsules, and extracts, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
